description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named Wiki2PDF that runs in the default stage using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/andrea.ligios/wiki2pdf and is triggered only by pipeline triggers or manual web triggers. The job prints an ASCII banner in before_script, then executes the following shell commands in order: `git clone ${GITLAB_SCHEME}://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_BUILD_TOKEN}@${GITLAB_DOMAIN}/${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.wiki.git`, `mkdir -p wiki/source/uploads`, `cd ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.wiki`, `mkdir tmp`, `mkdir http`, a conditional block that searches markdown files for `/uploads/` references, creates necessary folder structures under wiki/source, rewrites paths, and downloads the files with wget, another conditional block that processes markdown HTTP/HTTPS image links similarly, and two analogous conditional blocks for AsciiDoc `image::/uploads/` and `image::http(s)://` resources. The job stores all untracked files as artifacts and does not define caches or services.
